name: 中国政府奖学金 - Peking University bachelor
nameZh: 中国政府奖学金（北京大学本科）
description:
中国政府奖学金 - Peking University bachelor

This scholarship is designed to support outstanding international students in pursuing their education in China, providing a valuable opportunity to learn professional knowledge and deeply understand Chinese culture. The scholarship covers major expenses including tuition, accommodation, and living costs, significantly reducing the financial burden of studying abroad. Recipients will study in an excellent academic environment, access cutting-edge research findings, and grow alongside peers from around the world. The university provides comprehensive support services for scholarship students, including orientation programs, accommodation arrangements, visa processing, and medical insurance. Scholarship students can participate in diverse cultural activities to experience traditional Chinese culture and modern social life. A dedicated international student service center with multilingual staff is available to provide assistance at any time. After graduation, recipients become cultural ambassadors and bridges of friendship between China and their home countries. We sincerely welcome outstanding international students to apply.
descriptionZh:
中国政府奖学金（北京大学本科）

本奖学金旨在支持优秀国际学生来华学习，为全球青年提供深入了解中国、学习专业知识的宝贵机会。奖学金涵盖学费、住宿费、生活费等主要开支，大幅降低留学成本，让更多学生有机会实现留学梦想。获奖学生将在优质的学术环境中学习，接触前沿的研究成果，与来自世界各地的同学共同成长。学校为奖学金学生提供完善的支持服务，包括入学指导、住宿安排、签证办理、医疗保险等。奖学金学生还可以参加丰富多彩的文化活动，深入体验中国传统文化和现代社会生活。学校设有专门的国际学生服务中心，配备多语种工作人员，随时为学生提供帮助和指导。获奖学生在毕业后将成为中国与其母国之间的文化使者和友好桥梁，为促进国际交流与合作做出贡献。我们诚挚欢迎优秀国际学生申请本奖学金，开启精彩的留学之旅。
programNameZh: 北京大学应用机械工程方向1本科项目

standards.otherStandards: 包含国际往返机票一次

name: 省政府奖学金 - Shanghai Jiao Tong University language
nameZh: 省政府奖学金（上海交通大学语言进修）
description:
省政府奖学金 - Shanghai Jiao Tong University language

This scholarship program is established by the government to attract global talents to study in China and promote international educational exchange and cooperation. The scholarship offers substantial financial support with broad coverage, providing comprehensive economic assistance to international students. Recipients will study at top Chinese universities, enjoying high-quality educational resources and academic guidance. The university assigns experienced mentors to provide personalized academic guidance and career planning advice. Scholarship students can freely choose their major and participate in various academic activities and research projects. The university also organizes rich extracurricular activities including Chinese culture lectures, city tours, and traditional festival celebrations. Recipients will have opportunities to meet outstanding peers from around the world and build international networks. After graduation, students can choose to pursue further studies, work in China, or return to their home countries.
descriptionZh:
省政府奖学金（上海交通大学语言进修）

本奖学金项目由政府设立，旨在吸引全球优秀人才来华深造，促进国际教育交流与合作。奖学金资助力度大，覆盖范围广，为国际学生提供全方位的经济支持。获奖学生将进入中国顶尖高校学习，享受优质的教育资源和学术指导。学校为奖学金学生安排经验丰富的导师，提供个性化的学业指导和职业规划建议。奖学金学生可以自由选择专业方向，参与各类学术活动和科研项目。学校还为奖学金学生提供丰富的课外活动，包括中国文化讲座、城市探访、传统节日庆祝等。获奖学生将有机会结识来自世界各地的优秀同学，建立国际化的人脉网络。毕业后，学生可以选择继续深造、留华工作或返回母国发展，奖学金经历将成为宝贵的人生财富。本奖学金竞争激烈，我们期待有志青年积极申请，展现自己的才华和潜力。
programName: Shanghai Jiao Tong University - Humanities Language Program
programNameZh: 上海交通大学现代中国语言文学方向1语言进修项目
subMajorNameZh: 现代中国语言文学方向1

coverage.partialDetails: 部分覆盖学费和住宿费

name: 市政府奖学金 - Sun Yat-sen University phd
nameZh: 市政府奖学金（中山大学博士）
description:
市政府奖学金 - Sun Yat-sen University phd

This scholarship is a funding program specifically established for international students, aiming to cultivate high-quality talents with international perspectives and cross-cultural communication skills. The scholarship not only provides financial support but also opens doors to academic success and career development. Recipients will study and live in a vibrant campus environment, engaging deeply with Chinese students and other international students. The university regularly organizes academic seminars, discipline competitions, and innovation activities, providing platforms for students to showcase their talents. Scholarship students can use all university resources including libraries, laboratories, and sports facilities. The university also provides Chinese language training to help students improve their language skills and better integrate into Chinese life. Recipients will have opportunities to visit historical and cultural landmarks throughout China.
descriptionZh:
市政府奖学金（中山大学博士）

本奖学金是专门为国际学生设立的资助项目，旨在培养具有国际视野和跨文化沟通能力的高素质人才。奖学金不仅提供经济资助，更为获奖学生打开了通往学术成功和职业发展的大门。获奖学生将在充满活力的校园环境中学习和生活，与中国学生和其他国际学生深入交流。学校定期组织学术研讨会、学科竞赛、创新创业活动等，为学生提供展示才华的舞台。奖学金学生可以使用学校的图书馆、实验室、体育设施等各类资源，享受与本地学生同等的学习条件。学校还为奖学金学生提供汉语培训课程，帮助学生提高汉语水平，更好地融入中国生活。获奖学生将有机会参观中国的历史文化名胜，了解中国悠久的历史和灿烂的文明。本奖学金申请流程规范透明，评审标准公正客观，确保选拔出真正优秀的国际学生。
programName: Sun Yat-sen University - Arts Phd Program
programNameZh: 中山大学创新美术学方向1博士项目

coverage.partialDetails: 部分覆盖学费和住宿费

name: 院校奖学金 - Harbin Institute of Technology master
nameZh: 院校奖学金（哈尔滨工业大学硕士）
description:
院校奖学金 - Harbin Institute of Technology master

This scholarship program is committed to providing international students with high-quality educational opportunities and comprehensive development platforms. The scholarship offers rich funding including tuition waivers, living allowances, and accommodation arrangements, helping students focus on their studies without financial worries. Recipients will learn from renowned professors and scholars, receiving rigorous academic training to develop independent thinking and innovative research abilities. The university encourages scholarship students to participate in academic conferences, publish research papers, and apply for patents. Students can also apply to join overseas exchange programs organized by the university. Career guidance services help students understand the job market, prepare application materials, and attend job fairs. Graduated scholarship students are distributed across various industries worldwide, becoming backbone forces and leaders in their fields.
descriptionZh:
院校奖学金（哈尔滨工业大学硕士）

本奖学金项目致力于为国际学生提供高质量的教育机会和全面的发展平台。奖学金资助内容丰富，包括学费减免、生活补贴、住宿安排等，帮助学生专注于学业，无后顾之忧。获奖学生将师从知名教授和学者，接受严格的学术训练，培养独立思考和创新研究的能力。学校鼓励奖学金学生积极参与学术会议、发表研究论文、申请专利等活动，提升学术影响力。奖学金学生还可以申请参加学校组织的海外交流项目，进一步拓展国际视野。学校为奖学金学生提供就业指导服务，帮助学生了解就业市场、准备求职材料、参加招聘会。毕业的奖学金学生遍布全球各行各业，成为各领域的骨干力量和领军人才。本奖学金欢迎来自世界各国的优秀学生申请，期待与您共同创造美好未来。
programName: Harbin Institute of Technology - Social Sciences Master Program
programNameZh: 哈尔滨工业大学精品社会学方向1硕士项目

name: 孔子学院奖学金 - Demo University 13 bachelor
nameZh: 孔子学院奖学金（示例大学13本科）
description:
孔子学院奖学金 - Demo University 13 bachelor

This scholarship is an important initiative for the internationalization of higher education, aiming to create a multicultural campus environment and promote exchange between Chinese and foreign students. The scholarship provides generous financial support, eliminating economic barriers and giving every talented student the opportunity to study in China. Recipients will experience the unique charm of Chinese higher education and understand Chinese educational philosophy. The university arranges rich social practice activities to help students understand China's economic and social development. Scholarship students can join various student organizations and enrich their extracurricular lives. The university also provides psychological counseling services to support students' mental health and help them adapt to new environments. Recipients will be cared for and respected by the university and society, feeling the friendliness and enthusiasm of the Chinese people.
descriptionZh:
孔子学院奖学金（示例大学13本科）

本奖学金是高等教育国际化的重要举措，旨在打造多元文化的校园环境，促进中外学生的交流与合作。奖学金为国际学生提供慷慨的经济资助，消除留学的经济障碍，让每一位有才华的学生都有机会来华学习。获奖学生将体验中国高等教育的独特魅力，了解中国的教育理念和人才培养模式。学校为奖学金学生安排丰富的社会实践活动，帮助学生深入了解中国经济社会发展的成就和机遇。奖学金学生可以参加学校的各类社团组织，发挥个人特长，丰富课余生活。学校还为奖学金学生提供心理健康咨询服务，关注学生的身心健康，帮助学生适应新的学习生活环境。获奖学生在华期间将受到学校和社会的关心和尊重，感受到中国人民的友好和热情。我们真诚欢迎各国优秀学生加入我们的大家庭，共同谱写国际教育合作的新篇章。
programNameZh: 示例大学13国际药学方向1本科项目

coverage.partialDetails: 部分覆盖学费和住宿费

本奖学金旨在支持优秀国际学生来华学习，为全球青年提供深入了解中国、学习专业知识的宝贵机会。奖学金涵盖学费、住宿费、生活费等主要开支，大幅降低留学成本，让更多学生有机会实现留学梦想。获奖学生将在优质的学术环境中学习，接触前沿的研究成果，与来自世界各地的同学共同成长。学校为奖学金学生提供完善的支持服务，包括入学指导、住宿安排、签证办理、医疗保险等。奖学金学生还可以参加丰富多彩的文化活动，深入体验中国传统文化和现代社会生活。学校设有专门的国际学生服务中心，配备多语种工作人员，随时为学生提供帮助和指导。获奖学生在毕业后将成为中国与其母国之间的文化使者和友好桥梁，为促进国际交流与合作做出贡献。我们诚挚欢迎优秀国际学生申请本奖学金，开启精彩的留学之旅。
programNameZh: 示例大学31应用土木工程方向1博士项目

standards.otherStandards: 包含国际往返机票一次

coverage.partialDetails: 部分覆盖学费和住宿费

name: 省政府奖学金 - Demo University 34 master
nameZh: 省政府奖学金（示例大学34硕士）
description:
省政府奖学金 - Demo University 34 master

This scholarship program is established by the government to attract global talents to study in China and promote international educational exchange and cooperation. The scholarship offers substantial financial support with broad coverage, providing comprehensive economic assistance to international students. Recipients will study at top Chinese universities, enjoying high-quality educational resources and academic guidance. The university assigns experienced mentors to provide personalized academic guidance and career planning advice. Scholarship students can freely choose their major and participate in various academic activities and research projects. The university also organizes rich extracurricular activities including Chinese culture lectures, city tours, and traditional festival celebrations. Recipients will have opportunities to meet outstanding peers from around the world and build international networks. After graduation, students can choose to pursue further studies, work in China, or return to their home countries.
descriptionZh:
省政府奖学金（示例大学34硕士）

本奖学金项目由政府设立，旨在吸引全球优秀人才来华深造，促进国际教育交流与合作。奖学金资助力度大，覆盖范围广，为国际学生提供全方位的经济支持。获奖学生将进入中国顶尖高校学习，享受优质的教育资源和学术指导。学校为奖学金学生安排经验丰富的导师，提供个性化的学业指导和职业规划建议。奖学金学生可以自由选择专业方向，参与各类学术活动和科研项目。学校还为奖学金学生提供丰富的课外活动，包括中国文化讲座、城市探访、传统节日庆祝等。获奖学生将有机会结识来自世界各地的优秀同学，建立国际化的人脉网络。毕业后，学生可以选择继续深造、留华工作或返回母国发展，奖学金经历将成为宝贵的人生财富。本奖学金竞争激烈，我们期待有志青年积极申请，展现自己的才华和潜力。
programNameZh: 示例大学34现代外国语言文学方向1硕士项目
subMajorNameZh: 现代外国语言文学方向1

coverage.partialDetails: 部分覆盖学费和住宿费

name: 市政府奖学金 - Demo University 37 bachelor
nameZh: 市政府奖学金（示例大学37本科）
description:
市政府奖学金 - Demo University 37 bachelor

This scholarship is a funding program specifically established for international students, aiming to cultivate high-quality talents with international perspectives and cross-cultural communication skills. The scholarship not only provides financial support but also opens doors to academic success and career development. Recipients will study and live in a vibrant campus environment, engaging deeply with Chinese students and other international students. The university regularly organizes academic seminars, discipline competitions, and innovation activities, providing platforms for students to showcase their talents. Scholarship students can use all university resources including libraries, laboratories, and sports facilities. The university also provides Chinese language training to help students improve their language skills and better integrate into Chinese life. Recipients will have opportunities to visit historical and cultural landmarks throughout China.
descriptionZh:
市政府奖学金（示例大学37本科）

本奖学金是专门为国际学生设立的资助项目，旨在培养具有国际视野和跨文化沟通能力的高素质人才。奖学金不仅提供经济资助，更为获奖学生打开了通往学术成功和职业发展的大门。获奖学生将在充满活力的校园环境中学习和生活，与中国学生和其他国际学生深入交流。学校定期组织学术研讨会、学科竞赛、创新创业活动等，为学生提供展示才华的舞台。奖学金学生可以使用学校的图书馆、实验室、体育设施等各类资源，享受与本地学生同等的学习条件。学校还为奖学金学生提供汉语培训课程，帮助学生提高汉语水平，更好地融入中国生活。获奖学生将有机会参观中国的历史文化名胜，了解中国悠久的历史和灿烂的文明。本奖学金申请流程规范透明，评审标准公正客观，确保选拔出真正优秀的国际学生。
programNameZh: 示例大学37创新戏剧与影视学方向1本科项目
subMajorNameZh: 创新戏剧与影视学方向1

name: 院校奖学金 - Demo University 40 language
nameZh: 院校奖学金（示例大学40语言进修）
description:
院校奖学金 - Demo University 40 language

This scholarship program is committed to providing international students with high-quality educational opportunities and comprehensive development platforms. The scholarship offers rich funding including tuition waivers, living allowances, and accommodation arrangements, helping students focus on their studies without financial worries. Recipients will learn from renowned professors and scholars, receiving rigorous academic training to develop independent thinking and innovative research abilities. The university encourages scholarship students to participate in academic conferences, publish research papers, and apply for patents. Students can also apply to join overseas exchange programs organized by the university. Career guidance services help students understand the job market, prepare application materials, and attend job fairs. Graduated scholarship students are distributed across various industries worldwide, becoming backbone forces and leaders in their fields.
descriptionZh:
院校奖学金（示例大学40语言进修）

本奖学金项目致力于为国际学生提供高质量的教育机会和全面的发展平台。奖学金资助内容丰富，包括学费减免、生活补贴、住宿安排等，帮助学生专注于学业，无后顾之忧。获奖学生将师从知名教授和学者，接受严格的学术训练，培养独立思考和创新研究的能力。学校鼓励奖学金学生积极参与学术会议、发表研究论文、申请专利等活动，提升学术影响力。奖学金学生还可以申请参加学校组织的海外交流项目，进一步拓展国际视野。学校为奖学金学生提供就业指导服务，帮助学生了解就业市场、准备求职材料、参加招聘会。毕业的奖学金学生遍布全球各行各业，成为各领域的骨干力量和领军人才。本奖学金欢迎来自世界各国的优秀学生申请，期待与您共同创造美好未来。
programName: Demo University 40 - Social Sciences Language Program
programNameZh: 示例大学40精品人类学方向1语言进修项目

name: 孔子学院奖学金 - Demo University 43 phd
nameZh: 孔子学院奖学金（示例大学43博士）
description:
孔子学院奖学金 - Demo University 43 phd

This scholarship is an important initiative for the internationalization of higher education, aiming to create a multicultural campus environment and promote exchange between Chinese and foreign students. The scholarship provides generous financial support, eliminating economic barriers and giving every talented student the opportunity to study in China. Recipients will experience the unique charm of Chinese higher education and understand Chinese educational philosophy. The university arranges rich social practice activities to help students understand China's economic and social development. Scholarship students can join various student organizations and enrich their extracurricular lives. The university also provides psychological counseling services to support students' mental health and help them adapt to new environments. Recipients will be cared for and respected by the university and society, feeling the friendliness and enthusiasm of the Chinese people.
descriptionZh:
孔子学院奖学金（示例大学43博士）

本奖学金是高等教育国际化的重要举措，旨在打造多元文化的校园环境，促进中外学生的交流与合作。奖学金为国际学生提供慷慨的经济资助，消除留学的经济障碍，让每一位有才华的学生都有机会来华学习。获奖学生将体验中国高等教育的独特魅力，了解中国的教育理念和人才培养模式。学校为奖学金学生安排丰富的社会实践活动，帮助学生深入了解中国经济社会发展的成就和机遇。奖学金学生可以参加学校的各类社团组织，发挥个人特长，丰富课余生活。学校还为奖学金学生提供心理健康咨询服务，关注学生的身心健康，帮助学生适应新的学习生活环境。获奖学生在华期间将受到学校和社会的关心和尊重，感受到中国人民的友好和热情。我们真诚欢迎各国优秀学生加入我们的大家庭，共同谱写国际教育合作的新篇章。
programNameZh: 示例大学43国际口腔医学方向1博士项目

nameZh: 中国政府奖学金（示例大学46硕士）
description:
中国政府奖学金 - Demo University 46 master

This scholarship is designed to support outstanding international students in pursuing their education in China, providing a valuable opportunity to learn professional knowledge and deeply understand Chinese culture. The scholarship covers major expenses including tuition, accommodation, and living costs, significantly reducing the financial burden of studying abroad. Recipients will study in an excellent academic environment, access cutting-edge research findings, and grow alongside peers from around the world. The university provides comprehensive support services for scholarship students, including orientation programs, accommodation arrangements, visa processing, and medical insurance. Scholarship students can participate in diverse cultural activities to experience traditional Chinese culture and modern social life. A dedicated international student service center with multilingual staff is available to provide assistance at any time. After graduation, recipients become cultural ambassadors and bridges of friendship between China and their home countries. We sincerely welcome outstanding international students to apply.

name: 省政府奖学金 - Demo University 14 language
nameZh: 省政府奖学金（示例大学14语言进修）
description:
省政府奖学金 - Demo University 14 language

This scholarship program is established by the government to attract global talents to study in China and promote international educational exchange and cooperation. The scholarship offers substantial financial support with broad coverage, providing comprehensive economic assistance to international students. Recipients will study at top Chinese universities, enjoying high-quality educational resources and academic guidance. The university assigns experienced mentors to provide personalized academic guidance and career planning advice. Scholarship students can freely choose their major and participate in various academic activities and research projects. The university also organizes rich extracurricular activities including Chinese culture lectures, city tours, and traditional festival celebrations. Recipients will have opportunities to meet outstanding peers from around the world and build international networks. After graduation, students can choose to pursue further studies, work in China, or return to their home countries.
descriptionZh:
省政府奖学金（示例大学14语言进修）

本奖学金项目由政府设立，旨在吸引全球优秀人才来华深造，促进国际教育交流与合作。奖学金资助力度大，覆盖范围广，为国际学生提供全方位的经济支持。获奖学生将进入中国顶尖高校学习，享受优质的教育资源和学术指导。学校为奖学金学生安排经验丰富的导师，提供个性化的学业指导和职业规划建议。奖学金学生可以自由选择专业方向，参与各类学术活动和科研项目。学校还为奖学金学生提供丰富的课外活动，包括中国文化讲座、城市探访、传统节日庆祝等。获奖学生将有机会结识来自世界各地的优秀同学，建立国际化的人脉网络。毕业后，学生可以选择继续深造、留华工作或返回母国发展，奖学金经历将成为宝贵的人生财富。本奖学金竞争激烈，我们期待有志青年积极申请，展现自己的才华和潜力。
programNameZh: 示例大学14现代历史学方向2语言进修项目

name: 市政府奖学金 - Demo University 17 phd
nameZh: 市政府奖学金（示例大学17博士）
description:
市政府奖学金 - Demo University 17 phd

This scholarship is a funding program specifically established for international students, aiming to cultivate high-quality talents with international perspectives and cross-cultural communication skills. The scholarship not only provides financial support but also opens doors to academic success and career development. Recipients will study and live in a vibrant campus environment, engaging deeply with Chinese students and other international students. The university regularly organizes academic seminars, discipline competitions, and innovation activities, providing platforms for students to showcase their talents. Scholarship students can use all university resources including libraries, laboratories, and sports facilities. The university also provides Chinese language training to help students improve their language skills and better integrate into Chinese life. Recipients will have opportunities to visit historical and cultural landmarks throughout China.
descriptionZh:
市政府奖学金（示例大学17博士）

本奖学金是专门为国际学生设立的资助项目，旨在培养具有国际视野和跨文化沟通能力的高素质人才。奖学金不仅提供经济资助，更为获奖学生打开了通往学术成功和职业发展的大门。获奖学生将在充满活力的校园环境中学习和生活，与中国学生和其他国际学生深入交流。学校定期组织学术研讨会、学科竞赛、创新创业活动等，为学生提供展示才华的舞台。奖学金学生可以使用学校的图书馆、实验室、体育设施等各类资源，享受与本地学生同等的学习条件。学校还为奖学金学生提供汉语培训课程，帮助学生提高汉语水平，更好地融入中国生活。获奖学生将有机会参观中国的历史文化名胜，了解中国悠久的历史和灿烂的文明。本奖学金申请流程规范透明，评审标准公正客观，确保选拔出真正优秀的国际学生。
programNameZh: 示例大学17创新设计学方向2博士项目

name: 院校奖学金 - Demo University 20 master
nameZh: 院校奖学金（示例大学20硕士）
description:
院校奖学金 - Demo University 20 master

This scholarship program is committed to providing international students with high-quality educational opportunities and comprehensive development platforms. The scholarship offers rich funding including tuition waivers, living allowances, and accommodation arrangements, helping students focus on their studies without financial worries. Recipients will learn from renowned professors and scholars, receiving rigorous academic training to develop independent thinking and innovative research abilities. The university encourages scholarship students to participate in academic conferences, publish research papers, and apply for patents. Students can also apply to join overseas exchange programs organized by the university. Career guidance services help students understand the job market, prepare application materials, and attend job fairs. Graduated scholarship students are distributed across various industries worldwide, becoming backbone forces and leaders in their fields.
descriptionZh:
院校奖学金（示例大学20硕士）

本奖学金项目致力于为国际学生提供高质量的教育机会和全面的发展平台。奖学金资助内容丰富，包括学费减免、生活补贴、住宿安排等，帮助学生专注于学业，无后顾之忧。获奖学生将师从知名教授和学者，接受严格的学术训练，培养独立思考和创新研究的能力。学校鼓励奖学金学生积极参与学术会议、发表研究论文、申请专利等活动，提升学术影响力。奖学金学生还可以申请参加学校组织的海外交流项目，进一步拓展国际视野。学校为奖学金学生提供就业指导服务，帮助学生了解就业市场、准备求职材料、参加招聘会。毕业的奖学金学生遍布全球各行各业，成为各领域的骨干力量和领军人才。本奖学金欢迎来自世界各国的优秀学生申请，期待与您共同创造美好未来。
programName: Demo University 20 - Social Sciences Master Program
programNameZh: 示例大学20精品政治学方向2硕士项目

name: 孔子学院奖学金 - Demo University 23 bachelor
nameZh: 孔子学院奖学金（示例大学23本科）
description:
孔子学院奖学金 - Demo University 23 bachelor

This scholarship is an important initiative for the internationalization of higher education, aiming to create a multicultural campus environment and promote exchange between Chinese and foreign students. The scholarship provides generous financial support, eliminating economic barriers and giving every talented student the opportunity to study in China. Recipients will experience the unique charm of Chinese higher education and understand Chinese educational philosophy. The university arranges rich social practice activities to help students understand China's economic and social development. Scholarship students can join various student organizations and enrich their extracurricular lives. The university also provides psychological counseling services to support students' mental health and help them adapt to new environments. Recipients will be cared for and respected by the university and society, feeling the friendliness and enthusiasm of the Chinese people.
descriptionZh:
孔子学院奖学金（示例大学23本科）

本奖学金是高等教育国际化的重要举措，旨在打造多元文化的校园环境，促进中外学生的交流与合作。奖学金为国际学生提供慷慨的经济资助，消除留学的经济障碍，让每一位有才华的学生都有机会来华学习。获奖学生将体验中国高等教育的独特魅力，了解中国的教育理念和人才培养模式。学校为奖学金学生安排丰富的社会实践活动，帮助学生深入了解中国经济社会发展的成就和机遇。奖学金学生可以参加学校的各类社团组织，发挥个人特长，丰富课余生活。学校还为奖学金学生提供心理健康咨询服务，关注学生的身心健康，帮助学生适应新的学习生活环境。获奖学生在华期间将受到学校和社会的关心和尊重，感受到中国人民的友好和热情。我们真诚欢迎各国优秀学生加入我们的大家庭，共同谱写国际教育合作的新篇章。
programNameZh: 示例大学23国际护理学方向2本科项目

name: 中国政府奖学金 - Demo University 26 language
nameZh: 中国政府奖学金（示例大学26语言进修）
description:
中国政府奖学金 - Demo University 26 language

This scholarship is designed to support outstanding international students in pursuing their education in China, providing a valuable opportunity to learn professional knowledge and deeply understand Chinese culture. The scholarship covers major expenses including tuition, accommodation, and living costs, significantly reducing the financial burden of studying abroad. Recipients will study in an excellent academic environment, access cutting-edge research findings, and grow alongside peers from around the world. The university provides comprehensive support services for scholarship students, including orientation programs, accommodation arrangements, visa processing, and medical insurance. Scholarship students can participate in diverse cultural activities to experience traditional Chinese culture and modern social life. A dedicated international student service center with multilingual staff is available to provide assistance at any time. After graduation, recipients become cultural ambassadors and bridges of friendship between China and their home countries. We sincerely welcome outstanding international students to apply.
descriptionZh:
中国政府奖学金（示例大学26语言进修）

本奖学金旨在支持优秀国际学生来华学习，为全球青年提供深入了解中国、学习专业知识的宝贵机会。奖学金涵盖学费、住宿费、生活费等主要开支，大幅降低留学成本，让更多学生有机会实现留学梦想。获奖学生将在优质的学术环境中学习，接触前沿的研究成果，与来自世界各地的同学共同成长。学校为奖学金学生提供完善的支持服务，包括入学指导、住宿安排、签证办理、医疗保险等。奖学金学生还可以参加丰富多彩的文化活动，深入体验中国传统文化和现代社会生活。学校设有专门的国际学生服务中心，配备多语种工作人员，随时为学生提供帮助和指导。获奖学生在毕业后将成为中国与其母国之间的文化使者和友好桥梁，为促进国际交流与合作做出贡献。我们诚挚欢迎优秀国际学生申请本奖学金，开启精彩的留学之旅。
programNameZh: 示例大学26数字化高等教育学方向2语言进修项目

本奖学金项目由政府设立，旨在吸引全球优秀人才来华深造，促进国际教育交流与合作。奖学金资助力度大，覆盖范围广，为国际学生提供全方位的经济支持。获奖学生将进入中国顶尖高校学习，享受优质的教育资源和学术指导。学校为奖学金学生安排经验丰富的导师，提供个性化的学业指导和职业规划建议。奖学金学生可以自由选择专业方向，参与各类学术活动和科研项目。学校还为奖学金学生提供丰富的课外活动，包括中国文化讲座、城市探访、传统节日庆祝等。获奖学生将有机会结识来自世界各地的优秀同学，建立国际化的人脉网络。毕业后，学生可以选择继续深造、留华工作或返回母国发展，奖学金经历将成为宝贵的人生财富。本奖学金竞争激烈，我们期待有志青年积极申请，展现自己的才华和潜力。
programNameZh: 示例大学44现代新闻传播学方向2硕士项目

coverage.partialDetails: 部分覆盖学费和住宿费

name: 市政府奖学金 - Demo University 47 bachelor
nameZh: 市政府奖学金（示例大学47本科）
description:
市政府奖学金 - Demo University 47 bachelor

This scholarship is a funding program specifically established for international students, aiming to cultivate high-quality talents with international perspectives and cross-cultural communication skills. The scholarship not only provides financial support but also opens doors to academic success and career development. Recipients will study and live in a vibrant campus environment, engaging deeply with Chinese students and other international students. The university regularly organizes academic seminars, discipline competitions, and innovation activities, providing platforms for students to showcase their talents. Scholarship students can use all university resources including libraries, laboratories, and sports facilities. The university also provides Chinese language training to help students improve their language skills and better integrate into Chinese life. Recipients will have opportunities to visit historical and cultural landmarks throughout China.
descriptionZh:
市政府奖学金（示例大学47本科）

本奖学金是专门为国际学生设立的资助项目，旨在培养具有国际视野和跨文化沟通能力的高素质人才。奖学金不仅提供经济资助，更为获奖学生打开了通往学术成功和职业发展的大门。获奖学生将在充满活力的校园环境中学习和生活，与中国学生和其他国际学生深入交流。学校定期组织学术研讨会、学科竞赛、创新创业活动等，为学生提供展示才华的舞台。奖学金学生可以使用学校的图书馆、实验室、体育设施等各类资源，享受与本地学生同等的学习条件。学校还为奖学金学生提供汉语培训课程，帮助学生提高汉语水平，更好地融入中国生活。获奖学生将有机会参观中国的历史文化名胜，了解中国悠久的历史和灿烂的文明。本奖学金申请流程规范透明，评审标准公正客观，确保选拔出真正优秀的国际学生。
programNameZh: 示例大学47创新艺术学理论方向2本科项目

coverage.partialDetails: 部分覆盖学费和住宿费

name: 院校奖学金 - Demo University 50 language
nameZh: 院校奖学金（示例大学50语言进修）
description:
院校奖学金 - Demo University 50 language

This scholarship program is committed to providing international students with high-quality educational opportunities and comprehensive development platforms. The scholarship offers rich funding including tuition waivers, living allowances, and accommodation arrangements, helping students focus on their studies without financial worries. Recipients will learn from renowned professors and scholars, receiving rigorous academic training to develop independent thinking and innovative research abilities. The university encourages scholarship students to participate in academic conferences, publish research papers, and apply for patents. Students can also apply to join overseas exchange programs organized by the university. Career guidance services help students understand the job market, prepare application materials, and attend job fairs. Graduated scholarship students are distributed across various industries worldwide, becoming backbone forces and leaders in their fields.
descriptionZh:
院校奖学金（示例大学50语言进修）

本奖学金项目致力于为国际学生提供高质量的教育机会和全面的发展平台。奖学金资助内容丰富，包括学费减免、生活补贴、住宿安排等，帮助学生专注于学业，无后顾之忧。获奖学生将师从知名教授和学者，接受严格的学术训练，培养独立思考和创新研究的能力。学校鼓励奖学金学生积极参与学术会议、发表研究论文、申请专利等活动，提升学术影响力。奖学金学生还可以申请参加学校组织的海外交流项目，进一步拓展国际视野。学校为奖学金学生提供就业指导服务，帮助学生了解就业市场、准备求职材料、参加招聘会。毕业的奖学金学生遍布全球各行各业，成为各领域的骨干力量和领军人才。本奖学金欢迎来自世界各国的优秀学生申请，期待与您共同创造美好未来。
programName: Demo University 50 - Social Sciences Language Program
programNameZh: 示例大学50精品公共管理方向2语言进修项目

name: 孔子学院奖学金 - Fudan University phd
nameZh: 孔子学院奖学金（复旦大学博士）
description:
孔子学院奖学金 - Fudan University phd

This scholarship is an important initiative for the internationalization of higher education, aiming to create a multicultural campus environment and promote exchange between Chinese and foreign students. The scholarship provides generous financial support, eliminating economic barriers and giving every talented student the opportunity to study in China. Recipients will experience the unique charm of Chinese higher education and understand Chinese educational philosophy. The university arranges rich social practice activities to help students understand China's economic and social development. Scholarship students can join various student organizations and enrich their extracurricular lives. The university also provides psychological counseling services to support students' mental health and help them adapt to new environments. Recipients will be cared for and respected by the university and society, feeling the friendliness and enthusiasm of the Chinese people.
descriptionZh:
孔子学院奖学金（复旦大学博士）

本奖学金是高等教育国际化的重要举措，旨在打造多元文化的校园环境，促进中外学生的交流与合作。奖学金为国际学生提供慷慨的经济资助，消除留学的经济障碍，让每一位有才华的学生都有机会来华学习。获奖学生将体验中国高等教育的独特魅力，了解中国的教育理念和人才培养模式。学校为奖学金学生安排丰富的社会实践活动，帮助学生深入了解中国经济社会发展的成就和机遇。奖学金学生可以参加学校的各类社团组织，发挥个人特长，丰富课余生活。学校还为奖学金学生提供心理健康咨询服务，关注学生的身心健康，帮助学生适应新的学习生活环境。获奖学生在华期间将受到学校和社会的关心和尊重，感受到中国人民的友好和热情。我们真诚欢迎各国优秀学生加入我们的大家庭，共同谱写国际教育合作的新篇章。
programNameZh: 复旦大学国际临床医学方向3博士项目

name: 中国政府奖学金 - Nanjing University master
nameZh: 中国政府奖学金（南京大学硕士）
description:
中国政府奖学金 - Nanjing University master

This scholarship is designed to support outstanding international students in pursuing their education in China, providing a valuable opportunity to learn professional knowledge and deeply understand Chinese culture. The scholarship covers major expenses including tuition, accommodation, and living costs, significantly reducing the financial burden of studying abroad. Recipients will study in an excellent academic environment, access cutting-edge research findings, and grow alongside peers from around the world. The university provides comprehensive support services for scholarship students, including orientation programs, accommodation arrangements, visa processing, and medical insurance. Scholarship students can participate in diverse cultural activities to experience traditional Chinese culture and modern social life. A dedicated international student service center with multilingual staff is available to provide assistance at any time. After graduation, recipients become cultural ambassadors and bridges of friendship between China and their home countries. We sincerely welcome outstanding international students to apply.
descriptionZh:
中国政府奖学金（南京大学硕士）

本奖学金旨在支持优秀国际学生来华学习，为全球青年提供深入了解中国、学习专业知识的宝贵机会。奖学金涵盖学费、住宿费、生活费等主要开支，大幅降低留学成本，让更多学生有机会实现留学梦想。获奖学生将在优质的学术环境中学习，接触前沿的研究成果，与来自世界各地的同学共同成长。学校为奖学金学生提供完善的支持服务，包括入学指导、住宿安排、签证办理、医疗保险等。奖学金学生还可以参加丰富多彩的文化活动，深入体验中国传统文化和现代社会生活。学校设有专门的国际学生服务中心，配备多语种工作人员，随时为学生提供帮助和指导。获奖学生在毕业后将成为中国与其母国之间的文化使者和友好桥梁，为促进国际交流与合作做出贡献。我们诚挚欢迎优秀国际学生申请本奖学金，开启精彩的留学之旅。

name: 市政府奖学金 - Demo University 27 phd
nameZh: 市政府奖学金（示例大学27博士）
description:
市政府奖学金 - Demo University 27 phd

This scholarship is a funding program specifically established for international students, aiming to cultivate high-quality talents with international perspectives and cross-cultural communication skills. The scholarship not only provides financial support but also opens doors to academic success and career development. Recipients will study and live in a vibrant campus environment, engaging deeply with Chinese students and other international students. The university regularly organizes academic seminars, discipline competitions, and innovation activities, providing platforms for students to showcase their talents. Scholarship students can use all university resources including libraries, laboratories, and sports facilities. The university also provides Chinese language training to help students improve their language skills and better integrate into Chinese life. Recipients will have opportunities to visit historical and cultural landmarks throughout China.
descriptionZh:
市政府奖学金（示例大学27博士）

本奖学金是专门为国际学生设立的资助项目，旨在培养具有国际视野和跨文化沟通能力的高素质人才。奖学金不仅提供经济资助，更为获奖学生打开了通往学术成功和职业发展的大门。获奖学生将在充满活力的校园环境中学习和生活，与中国学生和其他国际学生深入交流。学校定期组织学术研讨会、学科竞赛、创新创业活动等，为学生提供展示才华的舞台。奖学金学生可以使用学校的图书馆、实验室、体育设施等各类资源，享受与本地学生同等的学习条件。学校还为奖学金学生提供汉语培训课程，帮助学生提高汉语水平，更好地融入中国生活。获奖学生将有机会参观中国的历史文化名胜，了解中国悠久的历史和灿烂的文明。本奖学金申请流程规范透明，评审标准公正客观，确保选拔出真正优秀的国际学生。
programNameZh: 示例大学27创新音乐学方向3博士项目

name: 院校奖学金 - Demo University 30 master
nameZh: 院校奖学金（示例大学30硕士）
description:
院校奖学金 - Demo University 30 master

This scholarship program is committed to providing international students with high-quality educational opportunities and comprehensive development platforms. The scholarship offers rich funding including tuition waivers, living allowances, and accommodation arrangements, helping students focus on their studies without financial worries. Recipients will learn from renowned professors and scholars, receiving rigorous academic training to develop independent thinking and innovative research abilities. The university encourages scholarship students to participate in academic conferences, publish research papers, and apply for patents. Students can also apply to join overseas exchange programs organized by the university. Career guidance services help students understand the job market, prepare application materials, and attend job fairs. Graduated scholarship students are distributed across various industries worldwide, becoming backbone forces and leaders in their fields.
descriptionZh:
院校奖学金（示例大学30硕士）

本奖学金项目致力于为国际学生提供高质量的教育机会和全面的发展平台。奖学金资助内容丰富，包括学费减免、生活补贴、住宿安排等，帮助学生专注于学业，无后顾之忧。获奖学生将师从知名教授和学者，接受严格的学术训练，培养独立思考和创新研究的能力。学校鼓励奖学金学生积极参与学术会议、发表研究论文、申请专利等活动，提升学术影响力。奖学金学生还可以申请参加学校组织的海外交流项目，进一步拓展国际视野。学校为奖学金学生提供就业指导服务，帮助学生了解就业市场、准备求职材料、参加招聘会。毕业的奖学金学生遍布全球各行各业，成为各领域的骨干力量和领军人才。本奖学金欢迎来自世界各国的优秀学生申请，期待与您共同创造美好未来。
programName: Demo University 30 - Social Sciences Master Program
programNameZh: 示例大学30精品心理学方向3硕士项目

name: 孔子学院奖学金 - Demo University 33 bachelor
nameZh: 孔子学院奖学金（示例大学33本科）
description:
孔子学院奖学金 - Demo University 33 bachelor

This scholarship is an important initiative for the internationalization of higher education, aiming to create a multicultural campus environment and promote exchange between Chinese and foreign students. The scholarship provides generous financial support, eliminating economic barriers and giving every talented student the opportunity to study in China. Recipients will experience the unique charm of Chinese higher education and understand Chinese educational philosophy. The university arranges rich social practice activities to help students understand China's economic and social development. Scholarship students can join various student organizations and enrich their extracurricular lives. The university also provides psychological counseling services to support students' mental health and help them adapt to new environments. Recipients will be cared for and respected by the university and society, feeling the friendliness and enthusiasm of the Chinese people.
descriptionZh:
孔子学院奖学金（示例大学33本科）

本奖学金是高等教育国际化的重要举措，旨在打造多元文化的校园环境，促进中外学生的交流与合作。奖学金为国际学生提供慷慨的经济资助，消除留学的经济障碍，让每一位有才华的学生都有机会来华学习。获奖学生将体验中国高等教育的独特魅力，了解中国的教育理念和人才培养模式。学校为奖学金学生安排丰富的社会实践活动，帮助学生深入了解中国经济社会发展的成就和机遇。奖学金学生可以参加学校的各类社团组织，发挥个人特长，丰富课余生活。学校还为奖学金学生提供心理健康咨询服务，关注学生的身心健康，帮助学生适应新的学习生活环境。获奖学生在华期间将受到学校和社会的关心和尊重，感受到中国人民的友好和热情。我们真诚欢迎各国优秀学生加入我们的大家庭，共同谱写国际教育合作的新篇章。
programNameZh: 示例大学33国际公共卫生方向3本科项目

name: 中国政府奖学金 - Demo University 36 language
nameZh: 中国政府奖学金（示例大学36语言进修）
description:
中国政府奖学金 - Demo University 36 language

This scholarship is designed to support outstanding international students in pursuing their education in China, providing a valuable opportunity to learn professional knowledge and deeply understand Chinese culture. The scholarship covers major expenses including tuition, accommodation, and living costs, significantly reducing the financial burden of studying abroad. Recipients will study in an excellent academic environment, access cutting-edge research findings, and grow alongside peers from around the world. The university provides comprehensive support services for scholarship students, including orientation programs, accommodation arrangements, visa processing, and medical insurance. Scholarship students can participate in diverse cultural activities to experience traditional Chinese culture and modern social life. A dedicated international student service center with multilingual staff is available to provide assistance at any time. After graduation, recipients become cultural ambassadors and bridges of friendship between China and their home countries. We sincerely welcome outstanding international students to apply.
descriptionZh:
中国政府奖学金（示例大学36语言进修）

本奖学金旨在支持优秀国际学生来华学习，为全球青年提供深入了解中国、学习专业知识的宝贵机会。奖学金涵盖学费、住宿费、生活费等主要开支，大幅降低留学成本，让更多学生有机会实现留学梦想。获奖学生将在优质的学术环境中学习，接触前沿的研究成果，与来自世界各地的同学共同成长。学校为奖学金学生提供完善的支持服务，包括入学指导、住宿安排、签证办理、医疗保险等。奖学金学生还可以参加丰富多彩的文化活动，深入体验中国传统文化和现代社会生活。学校设有专门的国际学生服务中心，配备多语种工作人员，随时为学生提供帮助和指导。获奖学生在毕业后将成为中国与其母国之间的文化使者和友好桥梁，为促进国际交流与合作做出贡献。我们诚挚欢迎优秀国际学生申请本奖学金，开启精彩的留学之旅。
programNameZh: 示例大学36数字化学前教育学方向3语言进修项目

name: 省政府奖学金 - Demo University 39 phd
nameZh: 省政府奖学金（示例大学39博士）
description:
省政府奖学金 - Demo University 39 phd

This scholarship program is established by the government to attract global talents to study in China and promote international educational exchange and cooperation. The scholarship offers substantial financial support with broad coverage, providing comprehensive economic assistance to international students. Recipients will study at top Chinese universities, enjoying high-quality educational resources and academic guidance. The university assigns experienced mentors to provide personalized academic guidance and career planning advice. Scholarship students can freely choose their major and participate in various academic activities and research projects. The university also organizes rich extracurricular activities including Chinese culture lectures, city tours, and traditional festival celebrations. Recipients will have opportunities to meet outstanding peers from around the world and build international networks. After graduation, students can choose to pursue further studies, work in China, or return to their home countries.
descriptionZh:
省政府奖学金（示例大学39博士）

本奖学金项目由政府设立，旨在吸引全球优秀人才来华深造，促进国际教育交流与合作。奖学金资助力度大，覆盖范围广，为国际学生提供全方位的经济支持。获奖学生将进入中国顶尖高校学习，享受优质的教育资源和学术指导。学校为奖学金学生安排经验丰富的导师，提供个性化的学业指导和职业规划建议。奖学金学生可以自由选择专业方向，参与各类学术活动和科研项目。学校还为奖学金学生提供丰富的课外活动，包括中国文化讲座、城市探访、传统节日庆祝等。获奖学生将有机会结识来自世界各地的优秀同学，建立国际化的人脉网络。毕业后，学生可以选择继续深造、留华工作或返回母国发展，奖学金经历将成为宝贵的人生财富。本奖学金竞争激烈，我们期待有志青年积极申请，展现自己的才华和潜力。
programNameZh: 示例大学39专业植物保护方向3博士项目

本奖学金是专门为国际学生设立的资助项目，旨在培养具有国际视野和跨文化沟通能力的高素质人才。奖学金不仅提供经济资助，更为获奖学生打开了通往学术成功和职业发展的大门。获奖学生将在充满活力的校园环境中学习和生活，与中国学生和其他国际学生深入交流。学校定期组织学术研讨会、学科竞赛、创新创业活动等，为学生提供展示才华的舞台。奖学金学生可以使用学校的图书馆、实验室、体育设施等各类资源，享受与本地学生同等的学习条件。学校还为奖学金学生提供汉语培训课程，帮助学生提高汉语水平，更好地融入中国生活。获奖学生将有机会参观中国的历史文化名胜，了解中国悠久的历史和灿烂的文明。本奖学金申请流程规范透明，评审标准公正客观，确保选拔出真正优秀的国际学生。
programName: Sun Yat-sen University - Arts Bachelor Program
programNameZh: 中山大学创新美术学方向4本科项目

coverage.partialDetails: 部分覆盖学费和住宿费

name: 院校奖学金 - Harbin Institute of Technology language
nameZh: 院校奖学金（哈尔滨工业大学语言进修）
description:
院校奖学金 - Harbin Institute of Technology language

This scholarship program is committed to providing international students with high-quality educational opportunities and comprehensive development platforms. The scholarship offers rich funding including tuition waivers, living allowances, and accommodation arrangements, helping students focus on their studies without financial worries. Recipients will learn from renowned professors and scholars, receiving rigorous academic training to develop independent thinking and innovative research abilities. The university encourages scholarship students to participate in academic conferences, publish research papers, and apply for patents. Students can also apply to join overseas exchange programs organized by the university. Career guidance services help students understand the job market, prepare application materials, and attend job fairs. Graduated scholarship students are distributed across various industries worldwide, becoming backbone forces and leaders in their fields.
descriptionZh:
院校奖学金（哈尔滨工业大学语言进修）

本奖学金项目致力于为国际学生提供高质量的教育机会和全面的发展平台。奖学金资助内容丰富，包括学费减免、生活补贴、住宿安排等，帮助学生专注于学业，无后顾之忧。获奖学生将师从知名教授和学者，接受严格的学术训练，培养独立思考和创新研究的能力。学校鼓励奖学金学生积极参与学术会议、发表研究论文、申请专利等活动，提升学术影响力。奖学金学生还可以申请参加学校组织的海外交流项目，进一步拓展国际视野。学校为奖学金学生提供就业指导服务，帮助学生了解就业市场、准备求职材料、参加招聘会。毕业的奖学金学生遍布全球各行各业，成为各领域的骨干力量和领军人才。本奖学金欢迎来自世界各国的优秀学生申请，期待与您共同创造美好未来。
programName: Harbin Institute of Technology - Social Sciences Language Program
programNameZh: 哈尔滨工业大学精品社会学方向4语言进修项目

coverage.partialDetails: 部分覆盖学费和住宿费

name: 孔子学院奖学金 - Demo University 13 phd
nameZh: 孔子学院奖学金（示例大学13博士）
description:
孔子学院奖学金 - Demo University 13 phd

This scholarship is an important initiative for the internationalization of higher education, aiming to create a multicultural campus environment and promote exchange between Chinese and foreign students. The scholarship provides generous financial support, eliminating economic barriers and giving every talented student the opportunity to study in China. Recipients will experience the unique charm of Chinese higher education and understand Chinese educational philosophy. The university arranges rich social practice activities to help students understand China's economic and social development. Scholarship students can join various student organizations and enrich their extracurricular lives. The university also provides psychological counseling services to support students' mental health and help them adapt to new environments. Recipients will be cared for and respected by the university and society, feeling the friendliness and enthusiasm of the Chinese people.
descriptionZh:
孔子学院奖学金（示例大学13博士）

本奖学金是高等教育国际化的重要举措，旨在打造多元文化的校园环境，促进中外学生的交流与合作。奖学金为国际学生提供慷慨的经济资助，消除留学的经济障碍，让每一位有才华的学生都有机会来华学习。获奖学生将体验中国高等教育的独特魅力，了解中国的教育理念和人才培养模式。学校为奖学金学生安排丰富的社会实践活动，帮助学生深入了解中国经济社会发展的成就和机遇。奖学金学生可以参加学校的各类社团组织，发挥个人特长，丰富课余生活。学校还为奖学金学生提供心理健康咨询服务，关注学生的身心健康，帮助学生适应新的学习生活环境。获奖学生在华期间将受到学校和社会的关心和尊重，感受到中国人民的友好和热情。我们真诚欢迎各国优秀学生加入我们的大家庭，共同谱写国际教育合作的新篇章。
programNameZh: 示例大学13国际药学方向4博士项目

name: 中国政府奖学金 - Demo University 16 master
nameZh: 中国政府奖学金（示例大学16硕士）
description:
中国政府奖学金 - Demo University 16 master

This scholarship is designed to support outstanding international students in pursuing their education in China, providing a valuable opportunity to learn professional knowledge and deeply understand Chinese culture. The scholarship covers major expenses including tuition, accommodation, and living costs, significantly reducing the financial burden of studying abroad. Recipients will study in an excellent academic environment, access cutting-edge research findings, and grow alongside peers from around the world. The university provides comprehensive support services for scholarship students, including orientation programs, accommodation arrangements, visa processing, and medical insurance. Scholarship students can participate in diverse cultural activities to experience traditional Chinese culture and modern social life. A dedicated international student service center with multilingual staff is available to provide assistance at any time. After graduation, recipients become cultural ambassadors and bridges of friendship between China and their home countries. We sincerely welcome outstanding international students to apply.
descriptionZh:
中国政府奖学金（示例大学16硕士）

本奖学金旨在支持优秀国际学生来华学习，为全球青年提供深入了解中国、学习专业知识的宝贵机会。奖学金涵盖学费、住宿费、生活费等主要开支，大幅降低留学成本，让更多学生有机会实现留学梦想。获奖学生将在优质的学术环境中学习，接触前沿的研究成果，与来自世界各地的同学共同成长。学校为奖学金学生提供完善的支持服务，包括入学指导、住宿安排、签证办理、医疗保险等。奖学金学生还可以参加丰富多彩的文化活动，深入体验中国传统文化和现代社会生活。学校设有专门的国际学生服务中心，配备多语种工作人员，随时为学生提供帮助和指导。获奖学生在毕业后将成为中国与其母国之间的文化使者和友好桥梁，为促进国际交流与合作做出贡献。我们诚挚欢迎优秀国际学生申请本奖学金，开启精彩的留学之旅。
programNameZh: 示例大学16数字化课程与教学论方向4硕士项目
subMajorNameZh: 数字化课程与教学论方向4

standards.otherStandards: 包含国际往返机票一次

name: 省政府奖学金 - Demo University 19 bachelor
nameZh: 省政府奖学金（示例大学19本科）
description:
省政府奖学金 - Demo University 19 bachelor

This scholarship program is established by the government to attract global talents to study in China and promote international educational exchange and cooperation. The scholarship offers substantial financial support with broad coverage, providing comprehensive economic assistance to international students. Recipients will study at top Chinese universities, enjoying high-quality educational resources and academic guidance. The university assigns experienced mentors to provide personalized academic guidance and career planning advice. Scholarship students can freely choose their major and participate in various academic activities and research projects. The university also organizes rich extracurricular activities including Chinese culture lectures, city tours, and traditional festival celebrations. Recipients will have opportunities to meet outstanding peers from around the world and build international networks. After graduation, students can choose to pursue further studies, work in China, or return to their home countries.
descriptionZh:
省政府奖学金（示例大学19本科）

本奖学金项目由政府设立，旨在吸引全球优秀人才来华深造，促进国际教育交流与合作。奖学金资助力度大，覆盖范围广，为国际学生提供全方位的经济支持。获奖学生将进入中国顶尖高校学习，享受优质的教育资源和学术指导。学校为奖学金学生安排经验丰富的导师，提供个性化的学业指导和职业规划建议。奖学金学生可以自由选择专业方向，参与各类学术活动和科研项目。学校还为奖学金学生提供丰富的课外活动，包括中国文化讲座、城市探访、传统节日庆祝等。获奖学生将有机会结识来自世界各地的优秀同学，建立国际化的人脉网络。毕业后，学生可以选择继续深造、留华工作或返回母国发展，奖学金经历将成为宝贵的人生财富。本奖学金竞争激烈，我们期待有志青年积极申请，展现自己的才华和潜力。
programNameZh: 示例大学19专业园艺学方向4本科项目

name: 院校奖学金 - Demo University 40 master
nameZh: 院校奖学金（示例大学40硕士）
description:
院校奖学金 - Demo University 40 master

This scholarship program is committed to providing international students with high-quality educational opportunities and comprehensive development platforms. The scholarship offers rich funding including tuition waivers, living allowances, and accommodation arrangements, helping students focus on their studies without financial worries. Recipients will learn from renowned professors and scholars, receiving rigorous academic training to develop independent thinking and innovative research abilities. The university encourages scholarship students to participate in academic conferences, publish research papers, and apply for patents. Students can also apply to join overseas exchange programs organized by the university. Career guidance services help students understand the job market, prepare application materials, and attend job fairs. Graduated scholarship students are distributed across various industries worldwide, becoming backbone forces and leaders in their fields.
descriptionZh:
院校奖学金（示例大学40硕士）

本奖学金项目致力于为国际学生提供高质量的教育机会和全面的发展平台。奖学金资助内容丰富，包括学费减免、生活补贴、住宿安排等，帮助学生专注于学业，无后顾之忧。获奖学生将师从知名教授和学者，接受严格的学术训练，培养独立思考和创新研究的能力。学校鼓励奖学金学生积极参与学术会议、发表研究论文、申请专利等活动，提升学术影响力。奖学金学生还可以申请参加学校组织的海外交流项目，进一步拓展国际视野。学校为奖学金学生提供就业指导服务，帮助学生了解就业市场、准备求职材料、参加招聘会。毕业的奖学金学生遍布全球各行各业，成为各领域的骨干力量和领军人才。本奖学金欢迎来自世界各国的优秀学生申请，期待与您共同创造美好未来。
programName: Demo University 40 - Social Sciences Master Program
programNameZh: 示例大学40精品人类学方向4硕士项目

name: 孔子学院奖学金 - Demo University 43 bachelor
nameZh: 孔子学院奖学金（示例大学43本科）
description:
孔子学院奖学金 - Demo University 43 bachelor

This scholarship is an important initiative for the internationalization of higher education, aiming to create a multicultural campus environment and promote exchange between Chinese and foreign students. The scholarship provides generous financial support, eliminating economic barriers and giving every talented student the opportunity to study in China. Recipients will experience the unique charm of Chinese higher education and understand Chinese educational philosophy. The university arranges rich social practice activities to help students understand China's economic and social development. Scholarship students can join various student organizations and enrich their extracurricular lives. The university also provides psychological counseling services to support students' mental health and help them adapt to new environments. Recipients will be cared for and respected by the university and society, feeling the friendliness and enthusiasm of the Chinese people.
descriptionZh:
孔子学院奖学金（示例大学43本科）

本奖学金是高等教育国际化的重要举措，旨在打造多元文化的校园环境，促进中外学生的交流与合作。奖学金为国际学生提供慷慨的经济资助，消除留学的经济障碍，让每一位有才华的学生都有机会来华学习。获奖学生将体验中国高等教育的独特魅力，了解中国的教育理念和人才培养模式。学校为奖学金学生安排丰富的社会实践活动，帮助学生深入了解中国经济社会发展的成就和机遇。奖学金学生可以参加学校的各类社团组织，发挥个人特长，丰富课余生活。学校还为奖学金学生提供心理健康咨询服务，关注学生的身心健康，帮助学生适应新的学习生活环境。获奖学生在华期间将受到学校和社会的关心和尊重，感受到中国人民的友好和热情。我们真诚欢迎各国优秀学生加入我们的大家庭，共同谱写国际教育合作的新篇章。
programNameZh: 示例大学43国际口腔医学方向4本科项目

coverage.partialDetails: 部分覆盖学费和住宿费

name: 中国政府奖学金 - Demo University 46 language
nameZh: 中国政府奖学金（示例大学46语言进修）
description:
中国政府奖学金 - Demo University 46 language

This scholarship is designed to support outstanding international students in pursuing their education in China, providing a valuable opportunity to learn professional knowledge and deeply understand Chinese culture. The scholarship covers major expenses including tuition, accommodation, and living costs, significantly reducing the financial burden of studying abroad. Recipients will study in an excellent academic environment, access cutting-edge research findings, and grow alongside peers from around the world. The university provides comprehensive support services for scholarship students, including orientation programs, accommodation arrangements, visa processing, and medical insurance. Scholarship students can participate in diverse cultural activities to experience traditional Chinese culture and modern social life. A dedicated international student service center with multilingual staff is available to provide assistance at any time. After graduation, recipients become cultural ambassadors and bridges of friendship between China and their home countries. We sincerely welcome outstanding international students to apply.
descriptionZh:
中国政府奖学金（示例大学46语言进修）

本奖学金旨在支持优秀国际学生来华学习，为全球青年提供深入了解中国、学习专业知识的宝贵机会。奖学金涵盖学费、住宿费、生活费等主要开支，大幅降低留学成本，让更多学生有机会实现留学梦想。获奖学生将在优质的学术环境中学习，接触前沿的研究成果，与来自世界各地的同学共同成长。学校为奖学金学生提供完善的支持服务，包括入学指导、住宿安排、签证办理、医疗保险等。奖学金学生还可以参加丰富多彩的文化活动，深入体验中国传统文化和现代社会生活。学校设有专门的国际学生服务中心，配备多语种工作人员，随时为学生提供帮助和指导。获奖学生在毕业后将成为中国与其母国之间的文化使者和友好桥梁，为促进国际交流与合作做出贡献。我们诚挚欢迎优秀国际学生申请本奖学金，开启精彩的留学之旅。
programNameZh: 示例大学46数字化教育技术学方向4语言进修项目
subMajorNameZh: 数字化教育技术学方向4

standards.otherStandards: 包含国际往返机票一次

name: 省政府奖学金 - Demo University 49 phd
nameZh: 省政府奖学金（示例大学49博士）
description:
省政府奖学金 - Demo University 49 phd

This scholarship program is established by the government to attract global talents to study in China and promote international educational exchange and cooperation. The scholarship offers substantial financial support with broad coverage, providing comprehensive economic assistance to international students. Recipients will study at top Chinese universities, enjoying high-quality educational resources and academic guidance. The university assigns experienced mentors to provide personalized academic guidance and career planning advice. Scholarship students can freely choose their major and participate in various academic activities and research projects. The university also organizes rich extracurricular activities including Chinese culture lectures, city tours, and traditional festival celebrations. Recipients will have opportunities to meet outstanding peers from around the world and build international networks. After graduation, students can choose to pursue further studies, work in China, or return to their home countries.
descriptionZh:
省政府奖学金（示例大学49博士）

本奖学金项目由政府设立，旨在吸引全球优秀人才来华深造，促进国际教育交流与合作。奖学金资助力度大，覆盖范围广，为国际学生提供全方位的经济支持。获奖学生将进入中国顶尖高校学习，享受优质的教育资源和学术指导。学校为奖学金学生安排经验丰富的导师，提供个性化的学业指导和职业规划建议。奖学金学生可以自由选择专业方向，参与各类学术活动和科研项目。学校还为奖学金学生提供丰富的课外活动，包括中国文化讲座、城市探访、传统节日庆祝等。获奖学生将有机会结识来自世界各地的优秀同学，建立国际化的人脉网络。毕业后，学生可以选择继续深造、留华工作或返回母国发展，奖学金经历将成为宝贵的人生财富。本奖学金竞争激烈，我们期待有志青年积极申请，展现自己的才华和潜力。
programNameZh: 示例大学49专业畜牧学方向4博士项目

name: 市政府奖学金 - Tsinghua University master
nameZh: 市政府奖学金（清华大学硕士）
description:
市政府奖学金 - Tsinghua University master

This scholarship is a funding program specifically established for international students, aiming to cultivate high-quality talents with international perspectives and cross-cultural communication skills. The scholarship not only provides financial support but also opens doors to academic success and career development. Recipients will study and live in a vibrant campus environment, engaging deeply with Chinese students and other international students. The university regularly organizes academic seminars, discipline competitions, and innovation activities, providing platforms for students to showcase their talents. Scholarship students can use all university resources including libraries, laboratories, and sports facilities. The university also provides Chinese language training to help students improve their language skills and better integrate into Chinese life. Recipients will have opportunities to visit historical and cultural landmarks throughout China.
descriptionZh:
市政府奖学金（清华大学硕士）

本奖学金是专门为国际学生设立的资助项目，旨在培养具有国际视野和跨文化沟通能力的高素质人才。奖学金不仅提供经济资助，更为获奖学生打开了通往学术成功和职业发展的大门。获奖学生将在充满活力的校园环境中学习和生活，与中国学生和其他国际学生深入交流。学校定期组织学术研讨会、学科竞赛、创新创业活动等，为学生提供展示才华的舞台。奖学金学生可以使用学校的图书馆、实验室、体育设施等各类资源，享受与本地学生同等的学习条件。学校还为奖学金学生提供汉语培训课程，帮助学生提高汉语水平，更好地融入中国生活。获奖学生将有机会参观中国的历史文化名胜，了解中国悠久的历史和灿烂的文明。本奖学金申请流程规范透明，评审标准公正客观，确保选拔出真正优秀的国际学生。
programNameZh: 清华大学高级工商管理方向1硕士项目

本奖学金项目致力于为国际学生提供高质量的教育机会和全面的发展平台。奖学金资助内容丰富，包括学费减免、生活补贴、住宿安排等，帮助学生专注于学业，无后顾之忧。获奖学生将师从知名教授和学者，接受严格的学术训练，培养独立思考和创新研究的能力。学校鼓励奖学金学生积极参与学术会议、发表研究论文、申请专利等活动，提升学术影响力。奖学金学生还可以申请参加学校组织的海外交流项目，进一步拓展国际视野。学校为奖学金学生提供就业指导服务，帮助学生了解就业市场、准备求职材料、参加招聘会。毕业的奖学金学生遍布全球各行各业，成为各领域的骨干力量和领军人才。本奖学金欢迎来自世界各国的优秀学生申请，期待与您共同创造美好未来。
programName: Demo University 20 - Social Sciences Language Program
programNameZh: 示例大学20精品政治学方向1语言进修项目

coverage.partialDetails: 部分覆盖学费和住宿费

name: 孔子学院奖学金 - Demo University 23 phd
nameZh: 孔子学院奖学金（示例大学23博士）
description:
孔子学院奖学金 - Demo University 23 phd

This scholarship is an important initiative for the internationalization of higher education, aiming to create a multicultural campus environment and promote exchange between Chinese and foreign students. The scholarship provides generous financial support, eliminating economic barriers and giving every talented student the opportunity to study in China. Recipients will experience the unique charm of Chinese higher education and understand Chinese educational philosophy. The university arranges rich social practice activities to help students understand China's economic and social development. Scholarship students can join various student organizations and enrich their extracurricular lives. The university also provides psychological counseling services to support students' mental health and help them adapt to new environments. Recipients will be cared for and respected by the university and society, feeling the friendliness and enthusiasm of the Chinese people.
descriptionZh:
孔子学院奖学金（示例大学23博士）

本奖学金是高等教育国际化的重要举措，旨在打造多元文化的校园环境，促进中外学生的交流与合作。奖学金为国际学生提供慷慨的经济资助，消除留学的经济障碍，让每一位有才华的学生都有机会来华学习。获奖学生将体验中国高等教育的独特魅力，了解中国的教育理念和人才培养模式。学校为奖学金学生安排丰富的社会实践活动，帮助学生深入了解中国经济社会发展的成就和机遇。奖学金学生可以参加学校的各类社团组织，发挥个人特长，丰富课余生活。学校还为奖学金学生提供心理健康咨询服务，关注学生的身心健康，帮助学生适应新的学习生活环境。获奖学生在华期间将受到学校和社会的关心和尊重，感受到中国人民的友好和热情。我们真诚欢迎各国优秀学生加入我们的大家庭，共同谱写国际教育合作的新篇章。
programNameZh: 示例大学23国际护理学方向1博士项目

coverage.partialDetails: 部分覆盖学费和住宿费

name: 中国政府奖学金 - Demo University 26 master
nameZh: 中国政府奖学金（示例大学26硕士）
description:
中国政府奖学金 - Demo University 26 master

This scholarship is designed to support outstanding international students in pursuing their education in China, providing a valuable opportunity to learn professional knowledge and deeply understand Chinese culture. The scholarship covers major expenses including tuition, accommodation, and living costs, significantly reducing the financial burden of studying abroad. Recipients will study in an excellent academic environment, access cutting-edge research findings, and grow alongside peers from around the world. The university provides comprehensive support services for scholarship students, including orientation programs, accommodation arrangements, visa processing, and medical insurance. Scholarship students can participate in diverse cultural activities to experience traditional Chinese culture and modern social life. A dedicated international student service center with multilingual staff is available to provide assistance at any time. After graduation, recipients become cultural ambassadors and bridges of friendship between China and their home countries. We sincerely welcome outstanding international students to apply.
descriptionZh:
中国政府奖学金（示例大学26硕士）

本奖学金旨在支持优秀国际学生来华学习，为全球青年提供深入了解中国、学习专业知识的宝贵机会。奖学金涵盖学费、住宿费、生活费等主要开支，大幅降低留学成本，让更多学生有机会实现留学梦想。获奖学生将在优质的学术环境中学习，接触前沿的研究成果，与来自世界各地的同学共同成长。学校为奖学金学生提供完善的支持服务，包括入学指导、住宿安排、签证办理、医疗保险等。奖学金学生还可以参加丰富多彩的文化活动，深入体验中国传统文化和现代社会生活。学校设有专门的国际学生服务中心，配备多语种工作人员，随时为学生提供帮助和指导。获奖学生在毕业后将成为中国与其母国之间的文化使者和友好桥梁，为促进国际交流与合作做出贡献。我们诚挚欢迎优秀国际学生申请本奖学金，开启精彩的留学之旅。
programNameZh: 示例大学26数字化高等教育学方向1硕士项目
subMajorNameZh: 数字化高等教育学方向1

standards.otherStandards: 包含国际往返机票一次

name: 省政府奖学金 - Demo University 29 bachelor
nameZh: 省政府奖学金（示例大学29本科）
description:
省政府奖学金 - Demo University 29 bachelor

This scholarship program is established by the government to attract global talents to study in China and promote international educational exchange and cooperation. The scholarship offers substantial financial support with broad coverage, providing comprehensive economic assistance to international students. Recipients will study at top Chinese universities, enjoying high-quality educational resources and academic guidance. The university assigns experienced mentors to provide personalized academic guidance and career planning advice. Scholarship students can freely choose their major and participate in various academic activities and research projects. The university also organizes rich extracurricular activities including Chinese culture lectures, city tours, and traditional festival celebrations. Recipients will have opportunities to meet outstanding peers from around the world and build international networks. After graduation, students can choose to pursue further studies, work in China, or return to their home countries.
descriptionZh:
省政府奖学金（示例大学29本科）

本奖学金项目由政府设立，旨在吸引全球优秀人才来华深造，促进国际教育交流与合作。奖学金资助力度大，覆盖范围广，为国际学生提供全方位的经济支持。获奖学生将进入中国顶尖高校学习，享受优质的教育资源和学术指导。学校为奖学金学生安排经验丰富的导师，提供个性化的学业指导和职业规划建议。奖学金学生可以自由选择专业方向，参与各类学术活动和科研项目。学校还为奖学金学生提供丰富的课外活动，包括中国文化讲座、城市探访、传统节日庆祝等。获奖学生将有机会结识来自世界各地的优秀同学，建立国际化的人脉网络。毕业后，学生可以选择继续深造、留华工作或返回母国发展，奖学金经历将成为宝贵的人生财富。本奖学金竞争激烈，我们期待有志青年积极申请，展现自己的才华和潜力。
programNameZh: 示例大学29专业农业资源与环境方向1本科项目
subMajorNameZh: 专业农业资源与环境方向1

name: 市政府奖学金 - Demo University 32 language
nameZh: 市政府奖学金（示例大学32语言进修）
description:
市政府奖学金 - Demo University 32 language

This scholarship is a funding program specifically established for international students, aiming to cultivate high-quality talents with international perspectives and cross-cultural communication skills. The scholarship not only provides financial support but also opens doors to academic success and career development. Recipients will study and live in a vibrant campus environment, engaging deeply with Chinese students and other international students. The university regularly organizes academic seminars, discipline competitions, and innovation activities, providing platforms for students to showcase their talents. Scholarship students can use all university resources including libraries, laboratories, and sports facilities. The university also provides Chinese language training to help students improve their language skills and better integrate into Chinese life. Recipients will have opportunities to visit historical and cultural landmarks throughout China.
descriptionZh:
市政府奖学金（示例大学32语言进修）

本奖学金是专门为国际学生设立的资助项目，旨在培养具有国际视野和跨文化沟通能力的高素质人才。奖学金不仅提供经济资助，更为获奖学生打开了通往学术成功和职业发展的大门。获奖学生将在充满活力的校园环境中学习和生活，与中国学生和其他国际学生深入交流。学校定期组织学术研讨会、学科竞赛、创新创业活动等，为学生提供展示才华的舞台。奖学金学生可以使用学校的图书馆、实验室、体育设施等各类资源，享受与本地学生同等的学习条件。学校还为奖学金学生提供汉语培训课程，帮助学生提高汉语水平，更好地融入中国生活。获奖学生将有机会参观中国的历史文化名胜，了解中国悠久的历史和灿烂的文明。本奖学金申请流程规范透明，评审标准公正客观，确保选拔出真正优秀的国际学生。
programNameZh: 示例大学32高级国际贸易方向1语言进修项目

This scholarship program is committed to providing international students with high-quality educational opportunities and comprehensive development platforms. nameZh: 孔子学院奖学金（复旦大学本科）
description:
孔子学院奖学金 - Fudan University bachelor

This scholarship is an important initiative for the internationalization of higher education, aiming to create a multicultural campus environment and promote exchange between Chinese and foreign students. The scholarship provides generous financial support, eliminating economic barriers and giving every talented student the opportunity to study in China. Recipients will experience the unique charm of Chinese higher education and understand Chinese educational philosophy. The university arranges rich social practice activities to help students understand China's economic and social development. Scholarship students can join various student organizations and enrich their extracurricular lives. The university also provides psychological counseling services to support students' mental health and help them adapt to new environments. Recipients will be cared for and respected by the university and society, feeling the friendliness and enthusiasm of the Chinese people.
descriptionZh:
孔子学院奖学金（复旦大学本科）

本奖学金是高等教育国际化的重要举措，旨在打造多元文化的校园环境，促进中外学生的交流与合作。奖学金为国际学生提供慷慨的经济资助，消除留学的经济障碍，让每一位有才华的学生都有机会来华学习。获奖学生将体验中国高等教育的独特魅力，了解中国的教育理念和人才培养模式。学校为奖学金学生安排丰富的社会实践活动，帮助学生深入了解中国经济社会发展的成就和机遇。奖学金学生可以参加学校的各类社团组织，发挥个人特长，丰富课余生活。学校还为奖学金学生提供心理健康咨询服务，关注学生的身心健康，帮助学生适应新的学习生活环境。获奖学生在华期间将受到学校和社会的关心和尊重，感受到中国人民的友好和热情。我们真诚欢迎各国优秀学生加入我们的大家庭，共同谱写国际教育合作的新篇章。
programNameZh: 复旦大学国际临床医学方向2本科项目

name: 中国政府奖学金 - Nanjing University language
nameZh: 中国政府奖学金（南京大学语言进修）
description:
中国政府奖学金 - Nanjing University language

This scholarship is designed to support outstanding international students in pursuing their education in China, providing a valuable opportunity to learn professional knowledge and deeply understand Chinese culture. The scholarship covers major expenses including tuition, accommodation, and living costs, significantly reducing the financial burden of studying abroad. Recipients will study in an excellent academic environment, access cutting-edge research findings, and grow alongside peers from around the world. The university provides comprehensive support services for scholarship students, including orientation programs, accommodation arrangements, visa processing, and medical insurance. Scholarship students can participate in diverse cultural activities to experience traditional Chinese culture and modern social life. A dedicated international student service center with multilingual staff is available to provide assistance at any time. After graduation, recipients become cultural ambassadors and bridges of friendship between China and their home countries. We sincerely welcome outstanding international students to apply.
descriptionZh:
中国政府奖学金（南京大学语言进修）

本奖学金旨在支持优秀国际学生来华学习，为全球青年提供深入了解中国、学习专业知识的宝贵机会。奖学金涵盖学费、住宿费、生活费等主要开支，大幅降低留学成本，让更多学生有机会实现留学梦想。获奖学生将在优质的学术环境中学习，接触前沿的研究成果，与来自世界各地的同学共同成长。学校为奖学金学生提供完善的支持服务，包括入学指导、住宿安排、签证办理、医疗保险等。奖学金学生还可以参加丰富多彩的文化活动，深入体验中国传统文化和现代社会生活。学校设有专门的国际学生服务中心，配备多语种工作人员，随时为学生提供帮助和指导。获奖学生在毕业后将成为中国与其母国之间的文化使者和友好桥梁，为促进国际交流与合作做出贡献。我们诚挚欢迎优秀国际学生申请本奖学金，开启精彩的留学之旅。
programNameZh: 南京大学数字化教育学原理方向2语言进修项目
subMajorNameZh: 数字化教育学原理方向2

standards.otherStandards: 包含国际往返机票一次

coverage.partialDetails: 部分覆盖学费和住宿费

name: 省政府奖学金 - Sichuan University phd
nameZh: 省政府奖学金（四川大学博士）
description:
省政府奖学金 - Sichuan University phd

This scholarship program is established by the government to attract global talents to study in China and promote international educational exchange and cooperation. The scholarship offers substantial financial support with broad coverage, providing comprehensive economic assistance to international students. Recipients will study at top Chinese universities, enjoying high-quality educational resources and academic guidance. The university assigns experienced mentors to provide personalized academic guidance and career planning advice. Scholarship students can freely choose their major and participate in various academic activities and research projects. The university also organizes rich extracurricular activities including Chinese culture lectures, city tours, and traditional festival celebrations. Recipients will have opportunities to meet outstanding peers from around the world and build international networks. After graduation, students can choose to pursue further studies, work in China, or return to their home countries.
descriptionZh:
省政府奖学金（四川大学博士）

本奖学金项目由政府设立，旨在吸引全球优秀人才来华深造，促进国际教育交流与合作。奖学金资助力度大，覆盖范围广，为国际学生提供全方位的经济支持。获奖学生将进入中国顶尖高校学习，享受优质的教育资源和学术指导。学校为奖学金学生安排经验丰富的导师，提供个性化的学业指导和职业规划建议。奖学金学生可以自由选择专业方向，参与各类学术活动和科研项目。学校还为奖学金学生提供丰富的课外活动，包括中国文化讲座、城市探访、传统节日庆祝等。获奖学生将有机会结识来自世界各地的优秀同学，建立国际化的人脉网络。毕业后，学生可以选择继续深造、留华工作或返回母国发展，奖学金经历将成为宝贵的人生财富。本奖学金竞争激烈，我们期待有志青年积极申请，展现自己的才华和潜力。
programNameZh: 四川大学专业作物学方向2博士项目

coverage.partialDetails: 部分覆盖学费和住宿费

name: 市政府奖学金 - Demo University 12 master
nameZh: 市政府奖学金（示例大学12硕士）
description:
市政府奖学金 - Demo University 12 master

This scholarship is a funding program specifically established for international students, aiming to cultivate high-quality talents with international perspectives and cross-cultural communication skills. The scholarship not only provides financial support but also opens doors to academic success and career development. Recipients will study and live in a vibrant campus environment, engaging deeply with Chinese students and other international students. The university regularly organizes academic seminars, discipline competitions, and innovation activities, providing platforms for students to showcase their talents. Scholarship students can use all university resources including libraries, laboratories, and sports facilities. The university also provides Chinese language training to help students improve their language skills and better integrate into Chinese life. Recipients will have opportunities to visit historical and cultural landmarks throughout China.
descriptionZh:
市政府奖学金（示例大学12硕士）

本奖学金是专门为国际学生设立的资助项目，旨在培养具有国际视野和跨文化沟通能力的高素质人才。奖学金不仅提供经济资助，更为获奖学生打开了通往学术成功和职业发展的大门。获奖学生将在充满活力的校园环境中学习和生活，与中国学生和其他国际学生深入交流。学校定期组织学术研讨会、学科竞赛、创新创业活动等，为学生提供展示才华的舞台。奖学金学生可以使用学校的图书馆、实验室、体育设施等各类资源，享受与本地学生同等的学习条件。学校还为奖学金学生提供汉语培训课程，帮助学生提高汉语水平，更好地融入中国生活。获奖学生将有机会参观中国的历史文化名胜，了解中国悠久的历史和灿烂的文明。本奖学金申请流程规范透明，评审标准公正客观，确保选拔出真正优秀的国际学生。
programNameZh: 示例大学12高级金融学方向2硕士项目

name: 院校奖学金 - Demo University 15 bachelor
nameZh: 院校奖学金（示例大学15本科）
description:
院校奖学金 - Demo University 15 bachelor

This scholarship program is committed to providing international students with high-quality educational opportunities and comprehensive development platforms. The scholarship offers rich funding including tuition waivers, living allowances, and accommodation arrangements, helping students focus on their studies without financial worries. Recipients will learn from renowned professors and scholars, receiving rigorous academic training to develop independent thinking and innovative research abilities. The university encourages scholarship students to participate in academic conferences, publish research papers, and apply for patents. Students can also apply to join overseas exchange programs organized by the university. Career guidance services help students understand the job market, prepare application materials, and attend job fairs. Graduated scholarship students are distributed across various industries worldwide, becoming backbone forces and leaders in their fields.
descriptionZh:
院校奖学金（示例大学15本科）

本奖学金项目致力于为国际学生提供高质量的教育机会和全面的发展平台。奖学金资助内容丰富，包括学费减免、生活补贴、住宿安排等，帮助学生专注于学业，无后顾之忧。获奖学生将师从知名教授和学者，接受严格的学术训练，培养独立思考和创新研究的能力。学校鼓励奖学金学生积极参与学术会议、发表研究论文、申请专利等活动，提升学术影响力。奖学金学生还可以申请参加学校组织的海外交流项目，进一步拓展国际视野。学校为奖学金学生提供就业指导服务，帮助学生了解就业市场、准备求职材料、参加招聘会。毕业的奖学金学生遍布全球各行各业，成为各领域的骨干力量和领军人才。本奖学金欢迎来自世界各国的优秀学生申请，期待与您共同创造美好未来。

本奖学金是高等教育国际化的重要举措，旨在打造多元文化的校园环境，促进中外学生的交流与合作。奖学金为国际学生提供慷慨的经济资助，消除留学的经济障碍，让每一位有才华的学生都有机会来华学习。获奖学生将体验中国高等教育的独特魅力，了解中国的教育理念和人才培养模式。学校为奖学金学生安排丰富的社会实践活动，帮助学生深入了解中国经济社会发展的成就和机遇。奖学金学生可以参加学校的各类社团组织，发挥个人特长，丰富课余生活。学校还为奖学金学生提供心理健康咨询服务，关注学生的身心健康，帮助学生适应新的学习生活环境。获奖学生在华期间将受到学校和社会的关心和尊重，感受到中国人民的友好和热情。我们真诚欢迎各国优秀学生加入我们的大家庭，共同谱写国际教育合作的新篇章。
programNameZh: 示例大学33国际公共卫生方向2博士项目

coverage.partialDetails: 部分覆盖学费和住宿费

name: 中国政府奖学金 - Demo University 36 master
nameZh: 中国政府奖学金（示例大学36硕士）
description:
中国政府奖学金 - Demo University 36 master

This scholarship is designed to support outstanding international students in pursuing their education in China, providing a valuable opportunity to learn professional knowledge and deeply understand Chinese culture. The scholarship covers major expenses including tuition, accommodation, and living costs, significantly reducing the financial burden of studying abroad. Recipients will study in an excellent academic environment, access cutting-edge research findings, and grow alongside peers from around the world. The university provides comprehensive support services for scholarship students, including orientation programs, accommodation arrangements, visa processing, and medical insurance. Scholarship students can participate in diverse cultural activities to experience traditional Chinese culture and modern social life. A dedicated international student service center with multilingual staff is available to provide assistance at any time. After graduation, recipients become cultural ambassadors and bridges of friendship between China and their home countries. We sincerely welcome outstanding international students to apply.
descriptionZh:
中国政府奖学金（示例大学36硕士）

本奖学金旨在支持优秀国际学生来华学习，为全球青年提供深入了解中国、学习专业知识的宝贵机会。奖学金涵盖学费、住宿费、生活费等主要开支，大幅降低留学成本，让更多学生有机会实现留学梦想。获奖学生将在优质的学术环境中学习，接触前沿的研究成果，与来自世界各地的同学共同成长。学校为奖学金学生提供完善的支持服务，包括入学指导、住宿安排、签证办理、医疗保险等。奖学金学生还可以参加丰富多彩的文化活动，深入体验中国传统文化和现代社会生活。学校设有专门的国际学生服务中心，配备多语种工作人员，随时为学生提供帮助和指导。获奖学生在毕业后将成为中国与其母国之间的文化使者和友好桥梁，为促进国际交流与合作做出贡献。我们诚挚欢迎优秀国际学生申请本奖学金，开启精彩的留学之旅。
programNameZh: 示例大学36数字化学前教育学方向2硕士项目
subMajorNameZh: 数字化学前教育学方向2

name: 省政府奖学金 - Demo University 39 bachelor
nameZh: 省政府奖学金（示例大学39本科）
description:
省政府奖学金 - Demo University 39 bachelor

This scholarship program is established by the government to attract global talents to study in China and promote international educational exchange and cooperation. The scholarship offers substantial financial support with broad coverage, providing comprehensive economic assistance to international students. Recipients will study at top Chinese universities, enjoying high-quality educational resources and academic guidance. The university assigns experienced mentors to provide personalized academic guidance and career planning advice. Scholarship students can freely choose their major and participate in various academic activities and research projects. The university also organizes rich extracurricular activities including Chinese culture lectures, city tours, and traditional festival celebrations. Recipients will have opportunities to meet outstanding peers from around the world and build international networks. After graduation, students can choose to pursue further studies, work in China, or return to their home countries.
descriptionZh:
省政府奖学金（示例大学39本科）

本奖学金项目由政府设立，旨在吸引全球优秀人才来华深造，促进国际教育交流与合作。奖学金资助力度大，覆盖范围广，为国际学生提供全方位的经济支持。获奖学生将进入中国顶尖高校学习，享受优质的教育资源和学术指导。学校为奖学金学生安排经验丰富的导师，提供个性化的学业指导和职业规划建议。奖学金学生可以自由选择专业方向，参与各类学术活动和科研项目。学校还为奖学金学生提供丰富的课外活动，包括中国文化讲座、城市探访、传统节日庆祝等。获奖学生将有机会结识来自世界各地的优秀同学，建立国际化的人脉网络。毕业后，学生可以选择继续深造、留华工作或返回母国发展，奖学金经历将成为宝贵的人生财富。本奖学金竞争激烈，我们期待有志青年积极申请，展现自己的才华和潜力。
programNameZh: 示例大学39专业植物保护方向2本科项目

name: 市政府奖学金 - Demo University 42 language
nameZh: 市政府奖学金（示例大学42语言进修）
description:
市政府奖学金 - Demo University 42 language

This scholarship is a funding program specifically established for international students, aiming to cultivate high-quality talents with international perspectives and cross-cultural communication skills. The scholarship not only provides financial support but also opens doors to academic success and career development. Recipients will study and live in a vibrant campus environment, engaging deeply with Chinese students and other international students. The university regularly organizes academic seminars, discipline competitions, and innovation activities, providing platforms for students to showcase their talents. Scholarship students can use all university resources including libraries, laboratories, and sports facilities. The university also provides Chinese language training to help students improve their language skills and better integrate into Chinese life. Recipients will have opportunities to visit historical and cultural landmarks throughout China.
descriptionZh:
市政府奖学金（示例大学42语言进修）

本奖学金是专门为国际学生设立的资助项目，旨在培养具有国际视野和跨文化沟通能力的高素质人才。奖学金不仅提供经济资助，更为获奖学生打开了通往学术成功和职业发展的大门。获奖学生将在充满活力的校园环境中学习和生活，与中国学生和其他国际学生深入交流。学校定期组织学术研讨会、学科竞赛、创新创业活动等，为学生提供展示才华的舞台。奖学金学生可以使用学校的图书馆、实验室、体育设施等各类资源，享受与本地学生同等的学习条件。学校还为奖学金学生提供汉语培训课程，帮助学生提高汉语水平，更好地融入中国生活。获奖学生将有机会参观中国的历史文化名胜，了解中国悠久的历史和灿烂的文明。本奖学金申请流程规范透明，评审标准公正客观，确保选拔出真正优秀的国际学生。
programNameZh: 示例大学42高级市场营销方向2语言进修项目

nameZh: 院校奖学金（示例大学45博士）
description:
院校奖学金 - Demo University 45 phd

This scholarship program is committed to providing international students with high-quality educational opportunities and comprehensive development platforms. The scholarship offers rich funding including tuition waivers, living allowances, and accommodation arrangements, helping students focus on their studies without financial worries. Recipients will learn from renowned professors and scholars, receiving rigorous academic training to develop independent thinking and innovative research abilities. The university encourages scholarship students to participate in academic conferences, publish research papers, and apply for patents. Students can also apply to join overseas exchange programs organized by the university. Career guidance services help students understand the job market, prepare application materials, and attend job fairs. Graduated scholarship students are distributed across various industries worldwide, becoming backbone forces and leaders in their fields.
